title: Step 1: Create a New Point Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New Point Object

Step 1: Create a New Point Object

	Click the [All Tools] -  [Point]
	 button  on the Vision Guide toolbar.
	You will see a point icon appear above the Point object
	 toolbar button
	Click the point icon and drag to the image display
	 of the Vision Guide window
	Notice that a name for the
	 object is automatically created.  In the example, it is called
	 "Point01" because this is the first Point object created
	 for this sequence.  (We will explain how to change the name later.)
